'''Dwoob''' were small draft animals from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Gamorr/Legends|Gamorr]] that were semi-domesticated by the native [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorreans]]. They were typically used to pull sleds during winter ([[Coldtime]]) and early spring ([[Slushtime]]).<ref name="Slushtime" />

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|14|Murder in Slushtime|reprint=1}} {{1st}}
